*highlighted section*  
Akẹkọọ ti ko ba lo ibomu ko gbọdọ wọnu ọgba ileewe -Ijọba Kwara  
Ijọba Kwara is a Nigerian footballer known for his skills in both **striking** and **tackling**, making him a versatile forward. He is often compared to **Lionel Messi** due to his **precision** and **control** in the final third. His ability to **create opportunities** and **score goals** makes him a key player for his team.  

In the **2022 FIFA World Cup**, Ijọba Kwara made his **international debut** and played a crucial role in Nigeria's **group stage** performance. He was **selected for the 2022 FIFA World Cup squad** and showcased his **football intelligence** and **physicality**.  

His **playmaking ability** and **goal-scoring record** have earned him recognition as one of the **top forwards** in Africa. He is also known for his **tenacity** and **resilience** on the field, which are essential traits for a **professional footballer**.  

*highlighted section*  
Ijọba Kwara's career highlights include his **international debut**, **performance in the 2022 FIFA World Cup**, and his **contribution to Nigerian football**. His **skills** and **work ethic** have made him a **role model** for young players in Nigeria and beyond.
